sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (date_time DateTime) ENGINE = Memory;
UPDATE test_dates SET date_time = parseDateTime32BestEffort('18/Aug/2020 09:30:00') WHERE date_time = parseDateTime32BestEffort('2023-05-15 10:10:10');
SELECT date_time, parseDateTime32BestEffort('Jun 17 11:15:25') AS parsed_alias FROM test_dates;
SELECT parseDateTime32BestEffort('1623825025') AS parsed_timestamp, toUnixTimestamp(date_time) FROM test_dates;
